## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and the affected host or shared module.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build:all`
- [ ] Rust checks were run when `tauri-app/src-tauri/` changed
- [ ] Tests cover changed document, persistence, or converter behavior

## Contribution rights

- [ ] I have the right to submit this work under the repository's MIT license.
- [ ] The change contains no credentials, personal data, or unapproved proprietary assets.
